verdict_reason: Tags on this verse are engineer-paralysis and incident-response. These are also used in BG 2.2 and BG 2.3 (and BG 2.5 uses team-state / decision-paralysis nearby). Across 2.1-2.3 the engineer-paralysis tag is used consistently to mark the operator's frozen-state — 2.1 names the moment, 2.2 sharply diagnoses it, 2.3 names it as petty heart-weakness and demands the operator stand. These are different teaching moves on a coherent doctrinal axis (paralysis as the failure to be answered). No direct contradiction. No subtle drift in the tag's meaning. The verse has no cross_references[] declared, so cross_reference_integrity_score is null. PASS, with the chapter-completion re-run as authoritative.
